name: visionclaw-agent
description: VisionClaw Agent — multi-tenant agentic AI platform exposing 243 tools, 16 specialist personas, hybrid-search Skill-RAG, and a self-improving skill registry over MCP for OpenAI Codex CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Agentic AI corporation in a box — delegate to 16 personas, call 243 tools, evolve a skill library.
interface.longDescription: VisionClaw Agent is a multi-tenant agentic platform. This plugin connects OpenAI Codex CLI to a running VisionClaw instance over MCP so Codex can: delegate tasks to specialist personas (Felix CEO, Forge engineer, Scribe writer, Apollo sales, Atlas data, Cassandra finance, Luna legal, and 9 more), call any of 243 production tools (Drive, email, calendar, web, code execution, scheduler, Stripe, marketing automation, code-health scan), search the hybrid BM25+vector knowledge base, and synthesize/promote new reusable skills. All requests are scoped to your tenant via a per-tenant MCP key.
defaultPrompt: Use VisionClaw to delegate this task to the right specialist persona.
Use VisionClaw to search my organisation's knowledge base for relevant prior decisions.
Use VisionClaw to schedule a recurring weekday-morning briefing.
